name: tokengolf
description: Gamify your Claude Code sessions. Flow mode tracks you. Roguelike mode trains you.

scripts.build:plugin: esbuild hooks/session-end.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --outfile=plugin/scripts/session-end.js && cp hooks/session-start.js hooks/post-tool-use.js hooks/post-tool-use-failure.js hooks/user-prompt-submit.js hooks/pre-compact.js hooks/subagent-start.js hooks/stop.js plugin/scripts/ && cp hooks/statusline.sh plugin/scripts/ && chmod +x plugin/scripts/statusline.sh
scripts.prepare: npm run build && npm run build:plugin && husky
